task: v0.4.15 — fix provider-list field mismatch, show all 9 presets
summary: v0.4.15 — fix provider-list field mismatch, show all 9 presets
reason:
Chairman reported '供应商（0）' even after saving MiniMax key successfully (v0.4.14). User requirements from the same message: (1) show all 9 presets by default — not just configured ones, (2) leave fallback chain default empty (no-op, current behavior), (3) provider/role rows missing some right-side buttons — the ✕ delete button for custom providers never appears, (4) UI polish — deferred to v0.5.

Root cause: TS `ProviderInfo` type (apps/desktop/src/lib/api.ts:61) declared 5 field names that the Rust `list_providers` handler (handlers.rs:543) never emitted. The filter `if (p.key_present || p.is_local || has_custom_models)` returned false for all 9 presets because every read was undefined — so the panel showed zero. The same mismatch also broke the ✕ custom-provider delete button (`p.notes.includes` → undefined.includes → false → no button), the env-var display (`p.api_key_env` → undefined), and the model count text (`p.models.length` → NaN).

Fix: canonicalized TS to read what Rust actually emits (secret_name, has_secret, note). Rust handler also now emits `models: []` and `is_local: false` for completeness (no longer required by the UI, but keeps the JSON contract discoverable). Filter logic in Settings.tsx:386-446 was rewritten to show all 9 presets unconditionally, dimming rows without has_secret (opacity-60) and disabling the toggle for those. Added a 'configured' subtitle count. Fallback chain default unchanged (left empty by design). Regression test added: list_providers_returns_presets_with_has_secret_set_after_put — pins the new schema + asserts has_secret toggles correctly after a PUT. 11/11 e2e + 20/20 unit pass. tsc clean.

Also: followed the v0.4.14 build sequence correctly this time — cargo build --release -p pipe-server --bin flowntier-runtime → cp to externalBin → pnpm tauri build → node scripts/patch-nsis.cjs → makensis. New runtime binary (8.2 MB stripped) shipped.

Version bumped 0.4.13 → 0.4.15 in tauri.conf.json + package.json. NSIS installer (8,373,846 bytes) at C:\Users\thatg\Desktop\Flowntier_0.4.15_x64-setup.exe. Awaiting chairman hand-test.
